data.title: Venture Global's Pullback Presents Big Opportunity, Analyst Says
data.description: Analyst sees major upside potential in Venture Global LNG, citing its disruptive model, fast execution, and exposure to favorable LNG spreads.

data.title: Nissin warns of steep profit slide but sees solid core business
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Nissin Foods projected that profits for 2024 would fall between 38% and 41%
	But other figures show that underlying revenue from China grew nearly 10% in the first nine months of last year


  

By Lee Shih Ta

data.title: Bill Gates Hopes Elon Musk Will Rethink Slashing USAID: Their Work Is Something 'Every Taxpayer Would Be Proud Of'
data.description: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) co-founder Bill Gates in an interview on Monday, expressed optimism that Elon Musk will rethink slashing USAID programs.

data.title: Israel To Begin Negotiations With Hamas For Permanent Cease-Fire, Release Of Remaining Hostages
data.description: Israel on Tuesday announced plans to enter negotiations with Hamas to secure a lasting ceasefire in Gaza and facilitate the release of the remaining Israeli hostages.
